title: Hey how you search for templates?

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
I recently started using Monday so for sure there is some lack of skill there.

But I finds it hard to search for automation/Integrations

So there are many native Integrations with popular platform and then when you Install an app that also comes with so many Integrations

So how you, search trough all of them?

posts.author: Monica.hutchinson (Monica Hutchinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

At the top of each board you create, you should see an “Integrate” and “Automate” button (to the right of the board title and to the left of your little photo icon). If you click either of these, you should see a search bar at the top to search for a platform. You also have the option to look through the pre-populated platforms or you can search by categories on the left hand side. Once you select your platform to integrate/automate, it’ll give you different options you can select for you boards. An example using Outlook as an automation: “When a column changes, send an email to someone”

Hope this helps!

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah that’s fine, but I still there must be some AI based search to find out all the automations I want, Instead of me reading through all what automation does.

and this becomes more difficult when some of team member is the native English speaker
